Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $227,946,274Details
International Box Office $396,287,998
Worldwide Box Office $624,234,272
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $92,115,695
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $904,108
Total $93,019,803
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$62,603,879 (27.5% of total gross)
Legs:3.64 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:36.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$150,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,965 opening theaters/3,965 max. theaters, 5.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $379,698,808

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 1st, 2008 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
Video Release: November 25th, 2008 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
December 1st, 2008 by Sony Pictures
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some intense sequences of sci-fi action and violence, and language.
Running Time: 92 minutes
Franchise: Hancock
Geographical setting: Brooklyn
Plot point: Car Accident, Faulty Memory, Heist, Hostage, Martial Arts, Police Standoff, Trains
Subgenre: Action Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Super Hero
Production/Financing Companies: Columbia Pictures, Relativity Media, Blue Light, Weed Road Pictures, Overbrook Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
